title: Kadhal Vennila Song Lyrics Vaanathaippola
stanzas:
Kadhal vennila
kayyil serumaa
sollu poongaatre
nee sollu poongaatre

imaiyaaga naanum iruppen
imaikkaamal paarthu rasippen
pala jenmam naan eduppen
unakkaaga kaathiruppen

Kadhal vennila
kayyil serumaa
sollu poongaatre
nee sollu poongaatre

Vaanathu nilavaai nee irundhaal
unaku badhil naan theindhiduven
theepathai pole nee irundhaal
unakku pathil naan urugiduven

poovanam pole nee irundhaal
poovukku badhil
naan udhirndhiduven
sollu poongaatre
nee sollu poongaatre

Kadhal vennila
kayyil serumaa
sollu poongaatre
nee sollu poongaatre

Oaviyam pol unni varaindhidave
udhiram kondu niram eduppen
silai ena unnai sedhukkidave
imaigal ennum uzhi eduppen

kavidhaiyai pol unai ezhudhidave
uyirukkul irundhu sol eduppen
sollu poongaatre
nee sollu poongaatre

Kadhal vennila
kayyil serumaa
sollu poongaatre
nee sollu poongaatre

imaiyaaga naanum iruppen
imaikkaamal paarthu rasippen
pala jenmam naan eduppen
unakkaaga kaathiruppen

Kadhal vennila
kayyil serumaa
sollu poongaatre
nee sollu poongaatre

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Vennila?

The song is a romantic melody that beautifully expresses the emotions of love and longing.

Who composed the music for Kadhal Vennila?

The music was composed by S.A. Rajkumar.

What is the release year of the movie Vaanathaippola?

The movie was released in the year 2000.

Who are the singers of Kadhal Vennila?

The song is sung by Hariharan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kadhal Vennila from the movie Vaanathaippola is a romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Composed by S.A. Rajkumar, it features soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics that evoke deep emotions. The song beautifully portrays the feelings of waiting and devotion in love, making it a timeless classic. Its nostalgic vibe and melodious composition make it perfect for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the timeless charm of Kadhal Vennila from the movie Vaanathaippola. This romantic melody, composed by S.A. Rajkumar, captures the essence of love with its soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics. Dive into a world of nostalgia and romance with this classic Tamil song.
stanzaMeanings: Will the moon of love come into my hands? Tell me, gentle breeze, you tell me, gentle breeze.
I will stay awake without blinking, watching and enjoying. I will take many births and wait for you.
Will the moon of love come into my hands? Tell me, gentle breeze, you tell me, gentle breeze.
If you are the moon in the sky, I will melt away for you. If you are like fire, I will melt for you.
If you are like a flower, I will fall like petals for you. Tell me, gentle breeze, you tell me, gentle breeze.
Will the moon of love come into my hands? Tell me, gentle breeze, you tell me, gentle breeze.
To draw you like a painting, I will use my blood for colors. To sculpt you, I will take the path of my eyes.
To write you like a poem, I will take words from within my soul. Tell me, gentle breeze, you tell me, gentle breeze.
Will the moon of love come into my hands? Tell me, gentle breeze, you tell me, gentle breeze.
I will stay awake without blinking, watching and enjoying. I will take many births and wait for you.
Will the moon of love come into my hands? Tell me, gentle breeze, you tell me, gentle breeze.
